body: thememedaddy:
reblog_comment:
I haven’t parodied in a while, but was inspired. To the tune of Baby Got Back:

Baby Got Depression

I feel like shit and I want to die
All you other sisters can’t deny
When a mood walks in that gives long face
And the bed feels like your place, you get sad
Wanna lay down and die, because depression loves to lie
Deep in those scrambled brain meats
Denying those serotonin treats
Oh bed, I wanna stay with yous, until I loose these stupid blues..
